index.title: Touchpointe.digital | Advanced Tech Training
index.heroSubtitle: Transforming businesses and launching student careers in AI, Cybersecurity, and Digital Marketing. Don't get left behind in the digital age.

whySection.heading: Why Tech Training is
whySection.subtitle: The digital landscape is evolving rapidly. Staying stagnant means falling behind.

points.title: Stop Losing Money to Agencies
points.description: Small and medium businesses bleed capital paying digital marketing agencies without understanding the metrics. Bring the knowledge in-house to take control of your growth and ROI.

points.title: Prevent Devastating Breaches
points.description: Cybersecurity is no longer a luxury for the enterprise. 60% of small businesses close within 6 months of a cyber attack. Train your team to build an impenetrable defense line.

points.title: The AI Revolution is Here
points.description: Artificial Intelligence isn't coming; it's already reshaping industries. Businesses utilizing AI are automating tasks and scaling 3x faster than those clinging to legacy methods.

costItems: Wasted ad spend on poor marketing campaigns
Vulnerability to ransomware and data extortion
whySection.costCta: Training empowers you to take control.

smbSection.heading: Business
smbSection.subtitle: Upskill your current workforce to protect assets, automate processes, and drive revenue. Stop relying entirely on expensive external agencies.

programs.title: Digital Marketing for SMBs
programs.description: Learn exactly how digital marketing works so you can stop bleeding money to agencies that deliver zero results. Understand metrics, run your own ads, and own your customer acquisition.

programs.title: AI Integration & Automation
programs.description: Stop doing manual work. We train your staff to implement Generative AI, automate workflows, and build customGPTs to save thousands of hours per year.

programs.title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
programs.description: Build a human firewall. Train your employees to identify phishing, secure endpoints, and comply with basic security standards to prevent devastating breaches and data loss.

studentsSection.heading: Student
studentsSection.subtitle: Enter the workforce with high-demand, practical skills that companies are desperate to hire for right now.

featuredProgram.title: 10-Day Future Innovators Masterclass
featuredProgram.description: A comprehensive, hands-on journey combining AI Foundations, Prompt Engineering, and Digital Marketing. Build a startup concept and launch your first AI-integrated website in just two weeks!

studentsSection.singleTrackLabel: Or browse our specialized single-track courses:

programs.title: AI Engineering & Prompting
programs.description: Master LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI tool integration. Become the AI specialist companies need to build their next-generation applications.

programs.title: Modern Digital Marketing
programs.description: Skip the theory. Learn performance marketing, SEO, social algorithms, and conversion rate optimization by spending real budgets on real campaigns.

programs.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
programs.description: Learn network defense, threat analysis, and ethical hacking. Prepare for industry-standard certifications (CompTIA Security+) and land your first SOC role.

footer.tagline: Transforming businesses and launching careers through advanced training in AI, Cybersecurity, and Digital Marketing.

syllabus.title: Program Syllabus | Touchpointe.digital
syllabus.heading: Official
syllabus.subtitle: Complete breakdown of our combined AI, Automation, and Digital Marketing curriculum.

days.title: Day 1: What is AI? (The Magic Behind the Screen)

slots.heading: Introduction: What is AI?
slots.detail: Use the "AI Camera" or "YouTube Recommendations" example. Explain that AI is just a computer program that learns from patterns.

slots.heading: Game Time:
slots.detail: Use Google Quick, Draw! to show how AI recognizes drawings. Discuss how it "learned" from millions of other sketches.

slots.heading: AI Hunt:
slots.detail: Group activity. Find 5 things in a student's daily life (Instagram filters, Siri, Google Translate) that use AI.

days.title: Day 2: Prompt Engineering (Talking to the Brain)

slots.heading: The "Robot Chef" Analogy:
slots.detail: If you tell a robot "Make tea" without details, it fails. Explain the Role-Task-Format framework.

slots.heading: Hands-on with ChatGPT/Gemini:
slots.detail: Show how to use AI to summarize a tough chapter from their 10th std Physics or History book.

slots.heading: The Prompt Challenge:
slots.detail: Students must write a prompt that makes AI explain "Photosynthesis" as if it were a sports commentator.

slots.heading: Generative Art:
slots.detail: Introduce Canva Magic Media or Adobe Firefly. Explain how text becomes an image.

slots.heading: Demo:
slots.detail: Create a logo or a poster for a "Future Edappal" project.

slots.heading: Activity:
slots.detail: Every student generates an AI avatar or a poster for their dream hobby/business.

slots.heading: What is Automation?
slots.detail: Explain "If This, Then That" (IFTTT). Show how an ATM or a vending machine is a simple form of automation.

slots.heading: Tool Intro:
slots.detail: Show a simple Google Form. Explain how we can make it automatically send an email back.

slots.heading: Practical:
slots.detail: Students design a "Contact Form" for a business and set up a basic auto-reply logic.

slots.heading: Deepfakes & Fake News:
slots.detail: Show examples (safe ones) of AI-generated faces. Teach them the "Check the source" rule.

slots.heading: The 70/30 Rule:
slots.detail: Use AI for 70% of the work, but the 30% (fact-checking and final touch) must be human.

slots.heading: Quiz/Debate:
slots.detail: "Will AI take our jobs or make us smarter?"

slots.heading: Branding Basics:
slots.detail: Why is the "Milma" logo blue? Why is "Jio" recognizable?

slots.heading: Startup Brainstorming:
slots.detail: Use AI to generate 5 business ideas based on a student's hobby (e.g., Football coaching, Art shop).

slots.heading: Activity:
slots.detail: Use AI to create a Name, Tagline, and Logo for their chosen business.

slots.heading: The Algorithm:
slots.detail: How Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts choose what to show you. Importance of the "First 3 Seconds."

slots.heading: Content Creation:
slots.detail: Use AI to write a script for a 30-second viral video for their business.

slots.heading: Activity:
slots.detail: Students "storyboard" a video and design a thumbnail using Canva.

slots.heading: Websites vs. Apps:
slots.detail: Why every business needs a home on the web.

slots.heading: The AI Builder:
slots.detail: Introduce a tool like Durable or Framer AI. Show how a site is built in 60 seconds.

slots.heading: Workshop:
slots.detail: Students start building their basic landing page — adding their name, logo, and a "Contact Me" section.

slots.heading: Chatbots:
slots.detail: Explain how a website can talk to customers while you sleep.

slots.heading: The Setup:
slots.detail: Add a simple WhatsApp button or a mini-chat feature to their website.

slots.heading: Refinement:
slots.detail: Finalizing the website — checking if links work and if the images look good on a mobile phone.

slots.heading: Final Touch-ups:
slots.detail: Making sure all projects are ready.

slots.heading: Presentations:
slots.detail: Each student shows their website and explains their AI-powered business idea to the class.

slots.heading: Certification:
slots.detail: Feedback session, awarding certificates, and a group photo.

metadata.title: AI Training Program | TouchPointe Digital
metadata.description: Master AI Skills with TouchPointe Digital. Join our hands-on training program powered by cutting-edge AI solutions like Hatti AI.

hero.title: Master AI Skills with TouchPointe Digital
hero.description: Join our hands-on training program powered by state-of-the-art AI systems like Hatti AI. Automate your workflows and lead the AI revolution effortlessly.

about.title: About TouchPointe Digital
paragraphs: TouchPointe Digital is an innovative technology company focused on building intelligent AI-driven solutions that empower businesses and individuals.

We specialize in automation, AI agents, and digital transformation strategies that deliver real-world impact. Our mission is to bridge the gap between advanced technology and practical application to create unprecedented value.

hattiAi.title: Introducing Hatti AI
hattiAi.subtitle: Experience the future of productivity with our advanced intelligent agent.
hattiAi.description: Hatti AI is our advanced intelligent agent designed to simplify workflows, automate tasks, and enhance productivity. Built using modern AI technologies, Hatti AI can assist in decision-making, data processing, and real-time interaction.

features.title: Smart Automation
features.description: Eliminate repetitive tasks and streamline your efficiency automatically.

features.title: Natural Language
features.description: Interact conversationally and seamlessly with your tools and data.

features.title: Workflow Integration
features.description: Connect Hatti AI deeply into your existing business systems.

learnItems.title: AI Fundamentals
learnItems.description: Core concepts, models, and how artificial intelligence truly works underneath.

learnItems.title: Building AI Agents
learnItems.description: Architecting, prompting, and deploying powerful agents like Hatti AI.

learnItems.title: Real-World Use Cases
learnItems.description: Applying AI to domains like marketing, data-analysis, and customer support.

learnItems.title: Hands-on Projects
learnItems.description: Building a complete AI application portfolio throughout the course duration.

trainer.title: Meet Your Trainer
trainer.description: Our training is led by experienced AI professionals with hands-on industry expertise in building scalable AI systems and automation tools. You will learn directly from the experts who engineer advanced models like Hatti AI.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Career?
cta.description: Spots are limited. Secure your place in our next cohort and start building your future with AI today.

footer.description: We specialize in automation, AI agents, and digital transformation strategies that deliver real-world impact.
